informal_statement: Let G be a finite group and p the smallest prime dividing |G|. Prove that any subgroup of index p in G is normal.
Prove that every group of order p^2 (p prime) is abelian.
Let R be a commutative ring with 1. Prove that an ideal P of R is prime if and only if R/P is an integral domain.
Prove that every finite group G of order p^n (p prime) has a non-trivial center.
Prove that the multiplicative group of a finite field F_q is cyclic.
